params._trustToken: Address of the TRUST ERC-20 token.

params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the bounty can expire.
params.reward: Amount of TRUST to lock as reward.
params.title: Short human-readable title.

returns.bountyId: The ID of the newly created bounty.

params.arbitrators: Array of 3 validator addresses for arbitration.

params.skillId: The on-chain skill ID being submitted.

params.inFavor: True to release to claimant, false to return to creator.

claimBounty(uint256).notice: Claim an open bounty. Only one claimant at a time.

completeBounty(uint256).notice: Creator approves the submission, releasing escrow to claimant.

createBounty(string,string,uint256,uint6.notice: Create a bounty and lock `reward` TRUST in escrow.

disputeBounty(uint256,address[3]).notice: Creator disputes a submission. Requires 3 arbitrator addresses.

expireBounty(uint256).notice: Expire a bounty past its deadline. Returns escrow to creator.

submitSkill(uint256,bytes32).notice: Submit a skill to fulfill a claimed bounty.
